'''Sevari Flashpistols''' were used and manufactured by the [[Sevari]] on [[Sevarcos II]] where ordinary [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] weapons were less effective, and sometimes even prone to [[Power cell/Legends|power pack]] detonations, due to the flying sand particles that would become electrically charged during the violent sand storms of Sevarcos II.<ref name="FTS" />

[[Flashpistol]]s were perfected by the clans of the [[Northern Frontier]]. They were muzzle-loaded projectile weapons firing rounded metal bullets via a charge of explosive powder. After one shot, the pistol would have to be reloaded, although two- and four-[[Barrel/Legends|barrel]] versions of it were known to exists. Some versions would also have a cutlass blade placed underneath the barrel for close combat purposes.<ref name="FTS" />

The [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Koh'shak]] carried a pair of Sevari Flashpistols.<ref name="KT">''[[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap]]''</ref>
